description: Rewrite the guardrails graph Mermaid emitter to the container model (task-container subgraphs with nested Preflights/Guardrails, two plan-level subgraphs, invisible anchors + anchor->anchor edges, no done_/fan-out; source-sha256 folds plan-level checks); prototype the anchor technique first; update ALL existing golden diagram.* fixtures + their tests; land SSOT §10 in the same change.
